title: Cookie Policy — DIGI-METER
description: DIGI-METER Cookie Policy — what cookies and local storage we use, why, and how to manage your preferences.

strings.source: A plain-language explanation of the cookies and local storage this website uses — and how to control them.
strings.value: A plain-language explanation of the cookies and local storage this website uses — and how to control them.

strings.source: This website uses no advertising or tracking cookies. We only store accessibility preferences in your browser's local storage. No data leaves your device without your explicit action.
strings.value: This website uses no advertising or tracking cookies. We only store accessibility preferences in your browser's local storage. No data leaves your device without your explicit action.

strings.source: Cookies are small text files placed on your device by websites you visit. They are widely used to make websites work, improve the user experience, or provide information to site owners.
strings.value: Cookies are small text files placed on your device by websites you visit. They are widely used to make websites work, improve the user experience, or provide information to site owners.

strings.source: is a related web technology that stores data locally in your browser — unlike cookies, it is never automatically transmitted to servers.
strings.value: is a related web technology that stores data locally in your browser — unlike cookies, it is never automatically transmitted to servers.

strings.value: set any HTTP cookies. We use browser

strings.source: Stores your high-contrast accessibility mode preference
strings.value: Stores your high-contrast accessibility mode preference

strings.source: Cleared when you toggle the setting off, or when you clear browser data
strings.value: Cleared when you toggle the setting off, or when you clear browser data

strings.source: Stores your selected text size preference (normal / large / extra-large)
strings.value: Stores your selected text size preference (normal / large / extra-large)

strings.source: Cleared when you reset via the A− button, or when you clear browser data
strings.value: Cleared when you reset via the A− button, or when you clear browser data

strings.source: cookies or tracking mechanisms of the following types:
strings.value: cookies or tracking mechanisms of the following types:

strings.source: Advertising or marketing cookies (Google Ads, Meta Pixel, etc.)
strings.value: Advertising or marketing cookies (Google Ads, Meta Pixel, etc.)

strings.source: External links on this site (such as to partner organisation websites) may use their own cookies. We have no control over those, and they are governed by the respective sites' cookie policies.
strings.value: External links on this site (such as to partner organisation websites) may use their own cookies. We have no control over those, and they are governed by the respective sites' cookie policies.

strings.source: The Inter and JetBrains Mono typefaces used on this website are self-hosted on our own server. No font files are loaded from Google or any other third party, and no technical data is shared with external font providers when you visit this site.
strings.value: The Inter and JetBrains Mono typefaces used on this website are self-hosted on our own server. No font files are loaded from Google or any other third party, and no technical data is shared with external font providers when you visit this site.

strings.source: Your high-contrast and font-size settings are stored locally. You can reset them at any time by clicking the
strings.value: Your high-contrast and font-size settings are stored locally. You can reset them at any time by clicking the

strings.source: buttons in the top bar of any page.
strings.value: buttons in the top bar of any page.

strings.source: To clear all locally stored data from this site:
strings.value: To clear all locally stored data from this site:

strings.source: Open Developer Tools (F12) → Application → Local Storage → right-click the site and select "Clear"
strings.value: Open Developer Tools (F12) → Application → Local Storage → right-click the site and select "Clear"

strings.source: Open Developer Tools (F12) → Storage → Local Storage → delete entries
strings.value: Open Developer Tools (F12) → Storage → Local Storage → delete entries

strings.source: Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website Data → search for this domain → remove
strings.value: Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website Data → search for this domain → remove

strings.source: Alternatively, clearing your browser's browsing data will remove all local storage for all sites.
strings.value: Alternatively, clearing your browser's browsing data will remove all local storage for all sites.

strings.source: If we introduce analytics or other cookies in the future (for example, to understand how learners use the assessment platform), we will update this policy and add a consent banner before any such cookies are set. The version number and date at the top of this page will be updated accordingly.
strings.value: If we introduce analytics or other cookies in the future (for example, to understand how learners use the assessment platform), we will update this policy and add a consent banner before any such cookies are set. The version number and date at the top of this page will be updated accordingly.
